# BRG Creative Group

> BRG Creative Group is a full-service marketing and growth agency based in Jupiter, Florida, serving the yachting, real estate and construction, events, and small business sectors across South Florida and the Treasure Coast. Services include brand strategy, web design and development, SEO, paid advertising, cinematic video production, and senior-level growth consulting.

BRG Creative Group repositions businesses for growth through a combination of strategy and high-end creative execution. The agency is led by founder Trevor Bragg, with Lauren Nesbitt as Director of Marketing and Yacht Media leading the yacht media and lead generation practice.

## What We Do

- Brand strategy: positioning, messaging, and identity for businesses ready to move upmarket
- Web design and development: fast, conversion-focused websites built for lead generation
- SEO: local and organic search visibility for service businesses in South Florida
- Paid advertising: campaign strategy, creative, and management across Google and Meta
- Cinematic content production: yacht films, real estate video, event coverage, and brand films
- Growth consulting: senior-level marketing strategy for owners and executive teams

## Industries We Serve

- Yachting: yacht media, charter and brokerage marketing, and lead generation
- Real estate and construction: agent, developer, and builder marketing across the Treasure Coast and South Florida
- Events: event promotion, coverage, and content
- Small and mid-sized businesses: full-funnel growth marketing

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.brgcreativegroup.com/): agency overview, services, and contact
- [Work](https://www.brgcreativegroup.com/work): portfolio including yacht ad reels and written case studies with real results, including a Treasure Coast real estate SEO case study and a yachting content strategy case study
